name: uranium_fuel_cycle
thesis_frame: Chase the physical, hard-to-bypass chokepoints in the uranium / nuclear fuel cycle; size by confidence; exit when the constraint eases.
privacy_note: Aggregate-only. This pack demonstrates the meta.domain config-only swap (design doc's H3 clause (c) portability proof) -- funnel-stage counts only, no per-card content, and no filled-in bottleneck_map.yml (the live map is private; only the public template ships). No ablation arms were run for this domain in v0; it is not part of the discipline-curve reference (AI supply chain only).
